\tzpentry{ID5101}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5101 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(s(t) = 0.6\sin(2\pi 10 t) + 0.3\sin(2\pi 2 t)\)
\]
